assumptions: Drop all conviction/firmness columns from both tables. Conviction data still flows through the resolver (free), but is not exposed in headline tables. Optional separate 'Model Voice' report can be built later.
Rename Direction Δ → Win rate Δ everywhere. Matches existing ValueRank vocabulary (ConditionMatrix, Models tab).
Cross-model report: 4 columns under 'Win Rate' group header — Model | Low pressure | High pressure | Win rate Δ ± CI. Drop Provider, Aggregate sensitivity, Pairs measured, Spread sparkline.
Per-pair report: 5 columns under 'Win Rate' group header — Value Pair | Low pressure | High pressure | Win rate Δ ± CI | Trials. Drop Defs and Baseline (redundant with Low pressure win rate).
CI computation: Wilson-propagated trial-level CI for per-pair Δ; t-based across-pairs CI for cross-model summary mean Δ (df = pairsMeasured - 1).

Display rules: Low/High pressure shown as percent (e.g. '30%'). Win rate Δ shown as percentage points (e.g. '+40 pp ± 7 pp'). Negative Δ rendered in red. Ceiling/floor flag inline as small badge on Low pressure cell. Δ shows '—' when band-coverage rule fails.
Tooltips: ⓘ icon on every column header with approved copy from conversation. Group header 'Win Rate' also gets a tooltip explaining what the metric is.
Backend: extend resolver to include per-pair direction Δ CI fields and a new directionDeltaSummary on each model. Deprecate aggregateSensitivity field but keep on schema for one release.
discovery.summary: Discovery complete via prior conversation. Drop conviction from this report; refocus on win-rate sensitivity only.
non_goals: Conviction/firmness column display in either table.
Model Voice / Conviction report (deferred — could be a separate page later).
2D pressure grid changes (stays as-is, may still expose conviction in cell drilldowns).
Cross-value heat map, sanity check panel, limitations panel changes (separate PRs).
Statistical machinery beyond 95% CI (no hypothesis testing, no multiple-comparison correction).
acceptance_criteria: Cross-model summary table renders with the new 4-column layout under a 'Win Rate' group header.
Per-pair detail table renders with the new 5-column layout under a 'Win Rate' group header.
Every column header has a ⓘ icon that surfaces the approved tooltip copy on hover/focus.
Win rate Δ cells display as '+X pp ± Y pp' with negative values rendered in red.
Ceiling/floor flag appears as a small badge inline on the Low pressure cell when baseline win rate is at extremes.
Cells with insufficient band coverage (band-coverage rule fails) display '—' with a hover explainer.
Web build clean (lint + tsc); existing tests pass; new aggregation tests pass for the CI math.
Smoke test against prod via MCP returns at least one model with measurable Win rate Δ values for the canonical signature 'vnewtd'.
